claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A localized navigation landmark with ordered hierarchy, a final current page, safe ancestor links, and lossless responsive collapse.
semantics: A non-empty accessible name identifies the nav; an ordered list preserves hierarchy and exactly the final item receives aria-current=page.
Every ancestor is a real non-empty safe href; ids are unique and empty labels or impossible current placement are rejected.
At narrow widths the first item, visible tail, current page, and all hidden ancestors remain available through a named native details disclosure.
Provider keys breadcrumb.label and breadcrumb.showHidden localize the landmark and pluralized disclosure name; explicit props win.

preferences.forcedColors: Native links, disclosure, and system focus remain perceivable.
preferences.reducedMotion: No hierarchy or disclosure information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical layout mirrors and bdi isolates item labels.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Container-query collapse preserves the complete hierarchy rather than visually or accessibly deleting it.
